<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[simple:Keyhole-shaped tumulus]]
'''Keyhole-shaped tumulus''' can refer to the following two types of [[Kofun]]:
* {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}}
* {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
